vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group

triage_decision.reason: Changing /etc/group permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG hardening step that does not risk lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect permissions could affect group membership resolution
